mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_report WHERE status = 'PENDING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_report WHERE status = 'PENDING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_ticket WHERE status = 'RECEIVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment WHERE status = 'HIDDEN'

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_report WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < (NOW() - INTERVAL #{days} DAY) UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM comment_report WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < (NOW() - INTERVAL #{days} DAY) )

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM post_report pr JOIN post_ai_result ar ON ar.post_id = pr.post_id AND ar.task_type = 'REPORT' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE pr.status = 'PENDING' AND JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.toxic') = TRUE AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence') AS DECIMAL(5,4)) >= #{threshold} )
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM support_ticket WHERE status = 'RECEIVED' AND created_at < (NOW() - INTERVAL #{days} DAY) )
